title: pavetta andongensis
intro: Pavetta andongensis, also known as the Andong Pavetta, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavetta andongensis include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Pavetta andongensis can be used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, often in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
